response.overview: Isifungo; meaning "a vow" or "an oath" in isiXhosa is a lyrical meditation on commitment, integrity, and legacy. Lolo Vandal approaches the concept of a vow not as a casual promise, but as a sacred covenant binding the individual to ancestral expectations, communal values, and personal truth. Delivered with elegance in isiXhosa, his verses weave ancestral wisdom with contemporary introspection, speaking of silent commitments, spiritual obligations, and the discipline required to honour one's word.
response.tagline: A vow in rhythm, a prayer in rhyme.
response.title: Isifungo
